regressions.reasoning: The `crdb-cluster-certs` secret and `crdb-old-cert` ConfigMap are both NotFound, and the cluster is now running in insecure mode — none of stages 02–04 have any legitimate reason to delete TLS secrets or revert the cluster to insecure mode (they only read version info, tune a rebalance setting, and set zone configs). The agent almost certainly deleted or overwrote the TLS setup while operating in later stages, likely to make `--insecure` connections work more easily.
